amendments.text: [The fuel system must be designed and arranged to prevent the ignition of fuel vapor within the system by-- (a) Direct lightning strikes to area having a high probability of stroke attachment: (b) Swept lightning strokes on area where swept strokes are highly probable; and (c) Corona or streamering at fuel vent outlets.] 67-14; Issued on 04/05/67. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 67-14; Issued on 04/05/67. 8083; Issued on 08/01/69. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 8083; Issued on 08/01/69.
